'''''Wind Runner''''' was a [[Ferryboat liner]] seen near [[Dunari's Rest]]. It was also seen near [[Camen Spaceport]] when shuttle ''[[Merte]]'' escaped the station.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
